intended_use: The Volta AF-Xplorer II assists operators in the real-time manual or automatic annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electr
intended_use_full: The Volta AF-Xplorer II assists operators in the real-time manual or automatic annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiting spatiotemporal dispersion during atrial fibrillation or atrial tachycardia.
ground_truth: Expert assessment; comparison with predicate device Volta AF-Xplorer dispersion maps
other_metrics: Unitary algorithm tests showed 100% conformity rate; qualitative and quantitative analysis of 2D dispersion maps demonstrated stable dispersion detection comparable to predicate device
